title: UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 59 Posts
shortInfo: The latest University College of Medical Sciences (UCMS) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 59 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of up to 40 years and possessing a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty (MSc Medical for Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Microbiology; MDS for Dentistry; 3-years tenure under Residency Scheme) are eligible to apply online. The application process will be active until 30 May 2026. Fin

basic_details.job_title: UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 59 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest University College of Medical Sciences (UCMS) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 59 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of up to 40 years and possessing a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty (MSc Medical for Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, Microbiology; MDS for Dentistry; 3-years tenure under Residency Scheme) are eligible to apply online. The application process will be active until 30 May 2026. Fin

age_limit.age_details: 40 years (relaxable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD as per Govt. of India norms)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates will receive age relaxation as per the Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology and Microbiology: MSc (Medical). For Dentistry: MDS Degree. For non-medical qualifications, Pay Matrix Level 7.
qualification.details: Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident: Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology and Microbiology: MSc (Medical) in the concerned subject. For Dentistry: MDS Degree in the concerned specialty of Dentistry. Experience: 3-years tenure under Residency Scheme

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level 11 (Rs.67700-208700/-) for PG Degree/Diploma, Level 10 (Rs.56100-177500/-) for MBBS, Level 7 (Rs.44900-142400/-) for Non-Medical Qualification.
salary_details.details: For PG Degree/Diploma Medical Qualification: Pay Matrix Level 11 (Rs.67700-208700/-) as per CCS (Revised Pay) Rules, 2016. For MBBS Qualification only: Pay Matrix Level 10 (Rs.56100-177500/-) as per CCS (Revised Pay) Rules, 2016. For Non-Medical Qualification: Pay Matrix Level 7 (Rs.44900-142400/-) as per CCS (Revised Pay) Rules, 2016.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCMS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the UCMS Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident positions is May 30, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 59 vacancies for the Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident posts announced by the University College of Medical Sciences (UCMS) in Delhi for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For specific subjects like Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, and Microbiology, an MSc (Medical) is required. For Dentistry, an MDS Degree is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these positions is 40 years. However, age relaxation is provided for SC, ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on qualification. For PG Degree/Diploma Medical Qualification, it's Pay Matrix Level 11 (Rs.67700-208700/-). For MBBS, it's Level 10 (Rs.56100-177500/-), and for Non-Medical Qualification, it's Level 7 (Rs.44900-142400/-).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UR/OBC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the UR, OBC, and EWS categories is Rs. 500/-. This fee is to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates?
faq.answer: Candidates from SC, ST, PwBD, and Women categories are required to pay a reduced application fee of Rs. 250/-. This fee should also be submitted through the online payment gateway.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Demonstrator/Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions involves an online application followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their application and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC), Scheduled Tribes (ST), Other Backward Classes (OBC), and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) as per the prevailing rules and regulations of the Government of India.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of UCMS for more details and to complete your application.
